title: siyach #7878
definition:
1) to put forth, mediate, muse, commune, speak, complain, ponder, sing
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to complain
        1a2) to muse, meditate upon, study, ponder
        1a3) to talk, sing, speak
    1b) (Polel) to meditate, consider, put forth thoughts
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to put forth, mediate, muse, commune, speak, complain, ponder, sing
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to complain
        1a2) to muse, meditate upon, study, ponder
        1a3) to talk, sing, speak
    1b) (Polel) to meditate, consider, put forth thoughts

    NASB:  to muse, complain, talk (of)
